question_en: Is Nursing a good career for my daughter? Is the salary good in 2026?
question_hi_hinglish: Kya Nursing meri beti ke liye accha career hai? 2026 mein salary kaisi milti hai?
answer_en: Nursing is one of the most stable careers globally in 2026. In India, starting salaries in private hospitals like Apollo or Fortis are ₹25k-35k. The biggest advantage is the high demand in Europe and the Gulf, where experienced nurses can earn ₹1.5L-3L per month. It is a 'Recession-proof' job.
answer_hi_hinglish: Nursing 2026 mein sabse stable jobs mein se ek hai. India mein private hospitals mein salary ₹25k-35k se shuru hoti hai. Iska sabse bada fayda Europe aur Gulf mein jobs ka hai, jahan salary ₹1.5L-3L tak ho sakti hai. Is field mein kabhi kaam kam nahi hota.

question_en: My child wants to do Physiotherapy (BPT). Is there any scope in Tier 2 cities?
question_hi_hinglish: Mera baccha Physiotherapy (BPT) karna chahta hai. Kya Tier 2 shehron mein iska scope hai?
answer_en: Massive scope! With rising awareness of fitness and an aging population, every major colony in Raipur or Bilaspur now needs a Physiotherapist. They can work in hospitals, sports clubs, or even start their own home-visit clinic. It's a respectable, independent medical profession.
answer_hi_hinglish: Bahut scope hai! Aaj kal Raipur ya Bilaspur jaise shehron mein log fitness aur physiotherapy ko bahut maante hain. Baccha hospital mein kaam kar sakta hai ya khud ki 'home-visit' service shuru kar sakta hai. Ye ek sammanit aur independent kaam hai.

question_en: Raipur has so many new apartments. Is Interior Design a real job there?
question_hi_hinglish: Raipur mein naye flats bahut ban rahe hain. Kya wahan Interior Design ki real job milti hai?
answer_en: Yes! The real estate boom in Chhattisgarh has created a huge demand for Interior Designers. New homeowners want modern kitchens and offices. A designer can work with builders or start a freelance consultancy. It is perfect for creative students who understand local tastes.
answer_hi_hinglish: Ji haan! Chhattisgarh mein real estate boom ki wajah se Interior Designers ki demand bahut badh gayi hai. Naye gharo mein log modular kitchen aur office banwana chahte hain. Baccha kisi builder ke saath ya khud ka design kaam shuru kar sakta hai.

question_en: My daughter wants to study Fashion Design. Is it only about glamour and Bollywood?
question_hi_hinglish: Beti Fashion Design padhna chahti hai. Kya ye sirf Bollywood aur glamour ke liye hai?
answer_en: Not at all. In 2026, Fashion Design is about 'Retail & E-commerce.' She can work for brands like Myntra, FabIndia, or start her own boutique specializing in local Chhattisgarh handloom (Kosa Silk). It’s a mix of business, technology, and art.
answer_hi_hinglish: Bilkul nahi. 2026 mein Fashion Design ka matlab Myntra ya FabIndia jaise brands mein kaam karna hai. Wo local Kosa Silk (Chhattisgarhi handloom) ka apna boutique bhi shuru kar sakti hai. Isme art ke saath-saath business ki bhi bahut growth hai.

question_en: What is 'Supply Chain Management'? My son saw a course for it.
question_hi_hinglish: Ye 'Supply Chain Management' kya hota hai? Bete ne iska course dekha hai.
answer_en: It is the science of moving goods from factories to customers (like how Amazon delivers). With Raipur being a major logistics hub for Central India, companies need managers to handle warehouses and transport. It is a high-growth corporate career for those good at math and planning.
answer_hi_hinglish: Ye factory se customer tak saman pahunchane ka business hai (jaise Amazon karta hai). Raipur ab Central India ka bada logistics hub hai, isliye yahan warehouse aur transport sambhalne walo ki bahut demand hai. Management mein interest rakhne walo ke liye ye best hai.

question_en: Can my child help local businesses go online? Is that a career?
question_hi_hinglish: Kya mera baccha local businesses ko online le jane mein help kar sakta hai? Kya ye koi career hai?
answer_en: Yes, this is called 'Digital Marketing.' Every local shop in Korba or Bhilai now wants to sell on Instagram or Google. A Digital Marketer helps them run ads and manage social media. It’s a job that can be done for local clients or global companies from home.
answer_hi_hinglish: Ji haan, ise 'Digital Marketing' kehte hain. Korba ya Bhilai ki har shop ab Instagram par dikhna chahti hai. Baccha in shops ke liye ads chala sakta hai aur social media sambhal sakta hai. Ye kaam wo ghar baithe ya kisi agency mein kar sakta hai.

question_en: Chhattisgarh has so much forest. Are there professional careers in Forestry?
question_hi_hinglish: Chhattisgarh mein itne jungle hain. Kya Forestry mein koi professional career hai?
answer_en: Absolutely. With a B.Sc in Forestry, your child can become a Forest Range Officer or work in Wildlife Conservation. Chhattisgarh has many state-funded projects for herbal medicine and forest produce (Minor Forest Produce). It’s a prestigious and secure career path.
answer_hi_hinglish: Zaroor! B.Sc Forestry ke baad baccha Forest Range Officer ban sakta hai ya Wildlife Conservation mein kaam kar sakta hai. Chhattisgarh mein jadi-booti aur forest produce (MFP) par bahut sarkari kaam hota hai. Ye ek sammanit aur pakki naukri wala rasta hai.

question_en: Is 'Herbal Science' a good field for the future?
question_hi_hinglish: Kya 'Herbal Science' future ke liye acchi field hai?
answer_en: Very good. The world is moving towards natural medicine. Chhattisgarh is the 'Herbal State' of India. Students who study this can work in processing units for Ayurveda companies or start their own organic produce business. It is a high-growth area with government support.
answer_hi_hinglish: Bahut acchi field hai. Duniya ab natural medicine ki taraf ja rahi hai aur Chhattisgarh ko 'Herbal State' mana jata hai. Isme padhai karke baccha Ayurveda companies mein kaam kar sakta hai ya organic business shuru kar sakta hai. Isme sarkari support bhi milta hai.
